title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. stevenii
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. stevenii, also known as rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. stevenii include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
